caption: A man wearing a reddish-pink athletic tank top stands in an indoor basketball gymnasium. The background features a wooden court with blue and green painted sections, blue bleachers, and a basketball hoop with a white backboard mounted on a white wall. The man is positioned in the center of the frame, facing the camera. Across the sequence, he speaks and shifts his posture slightly, moving his shoulders and head. In the final frame, he leans slightly closer to the camera while continuing to speak. No other people are present in the scene, and there is no visible on-screen text or logos. The lighting is bright and consistent throughout the gym, reflecting off the polished wooden floor.
